title: helianthemum croceum var. stoechadifolium
intro: Helianthemum croceum var. stoechadifolium, also known as Rockrose, is a flowering plant species belonging to the family Cistaceae. Traditionally, Rockrose has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues due to its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Rockrose include its ability to reduce inflammation, soothe skin irritations, and relieve respiratory congestion. Rockrose is often prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, which can be used to support its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
